API Reference
=============

This section contains the complete API reference for AnalysisG.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: API Documentation:

   core
   modules
   pyc

Core API
--------

The core module contains the fundamental building blocks of AnalysisG.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2

   core/analysis
   core/templates
   core/plotting
   core/io
   core/tools

Modules API
-----------

Specialized functionality and algorithms.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2

   modules/optimizer
   modules/metrics
   modules/nusol
   modules/plotting

PyC API
-------

High-performance C++/CUDA implementations.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2

   pyc/physics
   pyc/operators
   pyc/graph
   pyc/transform
   pyc/nusol
   pyc/tools
